creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #12)
> The main distfile is available from ftp.jclark.com
Right, and since that's what upstream provides means that original "upstream gone" situation had been fixed and now the port should not be deprecated because of that.

> but the patch set is only available on our own mirror.
I reckon this won't be a problem, I'll look into it tomorrow and either find a working mirror or will host it elsewhere.
